_description: Seasonal Campaigns — campaign calendar, seasonal services, offer fragments, messaging hooks

winter.label: Winter Prep
winter.hook: Winter is coming — is your car ready?
primary_services: Brake inspection (cold weather increases stopping distance)
upsell_tips: Bundle battery test with coolant check — both fail in the cold.
Offer a winter inspection package at a flat price.
Remind customers that AAA's #1 winter call-out is battery failure.
winter.offer_fragment: Get ready for winter — battery, coolant, and wiper check for just $[PRICE].
winter.urgency_note: First cold snap of the season drives the most calls — campaign before October 15.

spring.label: Spring Refresh
spring.hook: Spring clean for your car — shake off the winter.
primary_services: Undercarriage wash and inspection (road salt damage)
upsell_tips: Lead with alignment — potholes are top of mind in spring.
Pair AC check with cabin air filter — 'breathe clean this spring.'
Undercarriage inspection is a great trust-builder — show photos.
spring.offer_fragment: Spring checkup special — alignment, brakes, and fluids. Book before [DATE].
spring.urgency_note: Campaign in March before spring break travel season.

summer.label: Summer Road Trip Ready
summer.hook: Road trip season is here — don't break down miles from home.
primary_services: Tire pressure and tread check (heat increases blowout risk)
Belt and hose inspection (heat accelerates wear)
Battery test (heat is the #1 battery killer)
Oil change (hot weather increases oil breakdown)
upsell_tips: AC + cooling system bundle — both fail in summer heat.
Offer a 'road trip ready' package targeting families.
Tire blowout risk in heat — pair with rotation and pressure check.
summer.offer_fragment: Summer road trip special — AC check, fluids, and tire inspection. Ready in 90 minutes.
summer.urgency_note: Launch by Memorial Day weekend — biggest road trip kickoff.

fall.label: Fall Pre-Winter Check
fall.hook: Don't wait until the first freeze to find out something's wrong.
upsell_tips: Fall is the pre-winter season — frame it as insurance against winter breakdowns.
Back-to-school angle works for families in September.
Lights check is a quick win that builds trust.
fall.offer_fragment: Fall safety inspection — 20-point check for just $[PRICE]. Book in October.
fall.urgency_note: September campaigns catch customers before they forget about car care.

holiday.label: Holiday & Year-End
holiday.hook: Safe travels for the holidays — give the gift of a reliable car.
upsell_tips: Offer gift certificates — popular with families buying for new drivers.
Holiday travel framing reduces price resistance.
Year-end oil change is a quick capture before January slowdown.
holiday.offer_fragment: Holiday travel ready — inspection special through December [DATE].
holiday.urgency_note: Gift certificate push in the first two weeks of December.
